summary: Frontend testing for Maliye Listesi inline functionality. All 8 test cases passed. The section now renders inline on /app/raporlar without redirecting to a separate page.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Maliye Listesi section in BasicReports.jsx now renders inline on /app/raporlar. All functionality (date picker, fetch button, stats cards, search filter, CSV download, print, table) works correctly without page redirect. The page has both desktop and mobile content areas with duplicate data-testid elements - use visibility check to find the correct one.

test_cases_executed.test: Navigate to /app/raporlar, click Maliye Listesi - verify inline section (no redirect)
test_cases_executed.expected: Section appears inline, URL stays at /app/raporlar
test_cases_executed.details: URL remained at /app/raporlar, section-official container rendered inline
Date picker found and visible, showing 04/09/2026
Button clicked successfully, data loaded (16 records)

test_cases_executed.test: Summary stats cards appear after data loads
test_cases_executed.expected: 4 stats cards: Toplam Kayıt, Toplam Kişi, Toplam Tutar, Seçili Tarih
test_cases_executed.details: All 4 stats visible: Toplam Kayıt (16), Toplam Kişi (33), Toplam Tutar (₺498.381,00), Seçili Tarih (09.04.2026)
Search input visible with placeholder 'İsim, oda no, TCKN veya pasaport ile filtrele...'
CSV İndir button found and visible

test_cases_executed.expected: Columns: Misafir, TCKN/Pasaport, Ülke/Şehir, Oda, Giriş/Çıkış, Kişi, Tutar
test_cases_executed.details: All columns present in table with data-testid='official-guest-table'. Table shows 16 guest records with real data.
